notice: Public menu content. Prices, availability, and dietary indicators remain to be added after operational approval.

collections.name: House Signatures
collections.description: Four permanent compositions that carry the clearest expression of SIP.

drinks.name: Presence
drinks.menuLine: Blackberry · Black Tea · Charred Orange · Allspice
drinks.description: Blackberry and black tea unfold through charred orange and warm allspice, then resolve into a dry mineral finish. Rich at first, composed from beginning to end.
drinks.closingLine: Stay for the moment. Remember the night.
drinks.garnish: Thin charred-orange crescent and one ripe blackberry on a minimal gold pick

experience.midPalate: Structured black tea and allspice warmth

drinks.pairing: Charred jerk mushrooms with roasted plantain and tamarind glaze

drinks.name: Clarity
drinks.menuLine: Green Grape · Cucumber · White Tea · Citrus Blossom
drinks.description: Clarified green grape and cool cucumber meet white tea and citrus blossom in a pale, crystalline composition. Luminous at the opening, quietly floral through the middle, and mineral-dry at the finish.
drinks.garnish: Translucent cucumber ribbon and one tiny white edible blossom

experience.aroma: Cool cucumber, green grape, soft blossom
experience.midPalate: Delicate white tea and restrained florals

drinks.pairing: Callaloo croquettes with green mango and cashew-lime crema

drinks.name: Legacy
drinks.menuLine: Jamaican Sorrel · Roasted Ginger · Pimento · Blood Orange · Bay Leaf
drinks.description: Jamaican sorrel opens with deep ruby fruit, while roasted ginger, pimento, and bay leaf build warmth beneath a polished blood-orange finish. Familiar in memory, elevated in form.
drinks.closingLine: Honor what shaped you. Carry it forward.
drinks.garnish: Sorrel bloom and a thin flamed blood-orange coin
drinks.pairing: Jerk cauliflower steak with coconut rundown and escovitch vegetables

drinks.name: Renaissance
drinks.menuLine: Pink Guava · Passion Fruit · Hibiscus · Lime · Pink Peppercorn
drinks.description: Guava and passion fruit arrive vivid, hibiscus and lime give the composition lift, and a whisper of pink peppercorn extends the finish. Bright without becoming sweet; expressive without losing its poise.
drinks.closingLine: Become more of who you came to be.
drinks.garnish: Fine lime spiral and one small hibiscus bloom

experience.aroma: Guava perfume, passion fruit, fresh lime
experience.firstImpression: Vivid tropical fruit and bright acidity
experience.finish: Dry sparkle and a whisper of pink peppercorn

drinks.pairing: King oyster mushroom scallops with mango-pepper relish and coconut-lime purée
